title: Adaptive Multi-Agent Orchestration with Human-in-the-Loop for Automated Code Generation
summary: A research paper proposing OrchestratorFlow, a multi-agent automated code generation framework that adaptively coordinates planning, design, coding, review, and testing agents with human-in-the-loop support to improve reliability and reduce runtime errors.

title: Deep learning Based Defect Dection in Fire Redundant System
